recommendations.title: Ava
recommendations.overview: A black ops assassin is forced to fight for her own survival after a job goes dangerously wrong.

recommendations.title: The Help

recommendations.title: The Girl on the Train

recommendations.title: Ma
recommendations.overview: Sue Ann is a loner who keeps to herself in her quiet Ohio town. One day, she is asked by Maggie, a new teenager in town, to buy some booze for her and her friends, and Sue Ann sees the chance to make some unsuspecting, if younger, friends of her own.

recommendations.title: Breaking News in Yuba County

recommendations.title: El Cantante
recommendations.overview: The rise and fall of salsa singer, Héctor Lavoe (1946-1993), as told from the perspective of his wife Puchi, who looks back from 2002.

recommendations.title: The Doors
recommendations.overview: The story of the famous and influential 1960s rock band and its lead singer and composer, Jim Morrison.

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.

recommendations.title: Coal Miner's Daughter
recommendations.overview: Biography of Loretta Lynn, a country and western singer that came from poverty to fame.

recommendations.title: Miles Ahead
recommendations.overview: An exploration of the life and music of Miles Davis.
